case_title: IMELDA JACQUEZ VS. AUTURO DORIA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACQUEZ, IMELDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED MAR-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, AUTURO DORIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IMELDA JACQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTURO DORIA GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT STATED THE CLAIM HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR TRIAL TO NOV-30-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IMELDA JACQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTURO DORIA GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. (SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ WAS PRESENT AS REQUESTED FOR DEFENDANT.) PLAINTIFF INDICATES THE TERMS OF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT ARE NOT BEING COMPLIED WITH BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. MATTER IS SET FOR TRIAL ON NOVEMBER 30, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. IF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT IS STILL NOT BEING COMPLIED WITH, PARTIES MUST APPEAR AND BE PREPARED TO PRESENT THEIR EVIDENCE TO THE COURT AND THE COURT MAY RENDER A JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE CASE FOR TRIAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE OF HEARING FOR PROGRESS REPORT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,001.00 FILED BY JACQUEZ, IMELDA AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, AUTURO DORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF JACQUEZ, IMELDA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY JACQUEZ, IMELDA GONZALEZ, AUTURO DORIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-21-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IMELDA JACQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTURO DORIA GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS COURT TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPRETER AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JOHANNA VALLE (#376919). PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREIN DEFENDANT WILL PAY $1950 AS FULL SETTLEMENT OF THE CLAIMS. BEGINNING APRIL 1, 2023 AND CONTINUING TO MAY 1, 2024, DEFENDANT WILL PAY AN ADDITIONAL $150.00 ON TOP OF HIS CURRENT $650 RENT. HE ALSO AGREES TO PAY THE EXACT, NOT UNDER OR OVER, AMOUNT OF MONTHLY UTILITIES OWED FOR THE ENTIRETY OF HIS TENANCY. PARTIES WILL ALSO WORK ON IMPROVING THEIR COMMUNICATION TO RE-ESTABLISH A GOOD WORKING RELATIONSHIP. INITIAL PROGRESS REPORT ("PR") SET FOR THURS. SEPT. 21, 2023 AT 3:30 PM. IF NO APPEARANCES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR FINAL PR TUES. MAY 21, 2024 AT 3:30 PM AND DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF AGAIN NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-21-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IMELDA JACQUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTURO DORIA GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE JUDGE THAT THE DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS. STIPULATION TO JPT ON FILE. FINAL RESOLVE DATE IS MAY-21-2024. PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
